assertions.scriptName: partial UNIQUE index enforces predicate scoped duplicates
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relname, i.indisunique, pg_catalog.pg_get_expr(i.indpred, i.indrelid)
FROM pg_catalog.pg_index i
JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indexrelid
WHERE c.relname = 'memberships_one_active_idx';

assertions.scriptName: partial UNIQUE index enforces predicate scoped duplicates
assertions.query:
SELECT indexdef
FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
WHERE tablename = 'memberships'
  AND indexname = 'memberships_one_active_idx';

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX memberships_one_active_idx ON {{schema}}.memberships USING btree (user_id) WHERE (status = 'active'::text)
